headline: Blackstone's Q2 Earnings Coming Up: What's in Store for BX?
summary: Blackstone's Q2 results are likely to show higher AUM, fee growth and solid exit profits, with revenues and earnings expected to rise year over year.

headline: Anthony Scaramucci Says AI Will Bring a 3-Day or 4-Day Workweek, Not an Economic Crisis—'Don't Buy the AI Drama'
summary: Anthony Scaramucci said AI will bring shorter workweeks and more human-centered jobs, dismissing fears of mass job losses.
